rationale: Section 48.272 governs recovery of overallocated state funds. The homestead exemption increase does not alter this recovery mechanism; it may indirectly affect funding calculations but requires no amendment to this section.
quote: If a school district has received an overallocation of state funds, the agency shall, by withholding from subsequent allocations of state funds for the current or subsequent school year or by requesting and obtaining a refund, recover from the district an amount equal to the overallocation.
_note: No direct conflict. Subsection (b) references statutory changes to Chapters 46, 49, or 48; the proposed change is to Tax Code §11.13(b), outside that scope.
